velocity.trend: dormant — 1 commit in 12 months despite 486K stars

contributor_analysis.note: Original creator (320 of 611 commits) appears inactive. codecrafters-io org maintains sporadically. Effectively unmaintained.

ownership_transfer.commercial_use: Banner at top of README drives traffic to codecrafters.io platform

temporal_patterns.current: Practically dormant. 1 merge commit in last 12 months.

findings.title: Effectively unmaintained
findings.detail: 1 commit in 12 months. 460 open issues, 30 open PRs. No active triage.

findings.title: Ownership transfer to commercial entity
findings.detail: Originally by Daniel Stefanovic, now codecrafters-io. Banner promotes paid platform.

findings.title: Lifecycle: mature/dormant curated list
findings.detail: 8-year-old project. Content is still valuable but actively decaying (link rot).

summary: Classic 'viral awesome-list' lifecycle: explosive 2018 creation, gradual community contribution decline, org acquisition for marketing, now dormant. Content still valuable but unmaintained — expect link rot.
